title: Creamy Irish Cheese Stir Fry
description: A decadent and rich stir fry dish featuring Irish cream and cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook until they are translucent.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the Irish cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
6. Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes.
7. Stir in the shredded cheese until it is melted and the sauce is smooth.
8. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Serve the creamy Irish cheese stir fry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
